addCurseTokens: Add 1 {'{'}curse{'}'} token to the chaos bag | Add {count} {'{'}curse{'}'} tokens to the chaos bag
cancelMove: Cancel the effects of the move
chooseAfterSkillTestEffect: Choose after skill test effect to resolve
chooseInvestigatorToTakeControlOf: Choose investigator to take control of {name}
continueHavingDiscarded: Continue having discarded 1 card | Continue having discarded {count} cards
discardAssets: Discard an asset you control | Discard {count} assets you control
discardAllyAssetFromPlay: Discard an Ally asset you control from play
discardAllyAssetsFromHand: Discard each Ally asset from your hand
discardCardsWithMatchingIcons: Discard cards with at least 1 {'{'}{skillIcon}{'}'} icon | Discard cards with at least {count} {'{'}{skillIcon}{'}'} icons
discardAllCardsFromHand: Discard all cards in your hand
discardCardsFromHand: Choose and discard 1 card from your hand | Choose and discard {count} cards from your hand
discardCardsFromHandUpTo: Choose and discard up to 1 card from your hand | Choose and discard up to {count} cards from your hand
discardRandomCardsFromHand: Discard 1 random card from your hand | Discard {count} random cards from your hand
discardTopOfYourDeck: Discard the top card of your deck | Discard the top {count} cards of your deck
discardTopOfEncounterDeck: Discard the top card of the encounter deck | Discard the top {count} cards of the encounter deck
discoverAdditionalClues: Discover 1 additional clue | Discover {count} additional clues
discoverAtYourLocation: Discover 1 clue at your location | Discover {count} clues at your location
discoverClueAtThisLocation: Discover a clue at this location
discoverCluesAtConnecting: Discover 1 clue at a connecting location | Discover {count} clues at a connecting location
disengageAndMove: Disengage from each enemy and move to a connecting location
doNotAddCardsToHand: Do not add any cards to your Hand
doNotAddStartingCard: Do not add a Starting card to hand
doNotApplyDamageToConcealed: Do not apply damage to concealed
doNotChooseDifferentLocation: Do not choose a different location
doNotMoveAnyDamageHorror: Do not move any damage and/or horror
doNotMoveToConnecting: Do not move to a connecting location
doNotReturnCardToHand: Do not return card to hand
doNotUseElderSign: Do not use elder sign ability
shuffleBottomOfDiscardBackIntoDeck: Shuffle the bottom card of your discard back into your Deck | Shuffle the bottom {count} cards of your discard back into your Deck
doNotSpendClues: Do not spend a clue | Do not spend {count} clues
drawTopCardOfEncounterDeck: Draw the top card of the encounter deck | Draw the top {count} cards of the encounter deck
evadeEnemyAtThisLocation: Evade an enemy at this location
healDamageFromInvestigatorOrAlly: Heal {count} damage from an investigator or Ally asset at your location
healHorrorFromName: Heal 1 horror from {name} | Heal {count} horror from {name}
healMentalTrauma: Heal 1 mental trauma | Heal {count} mental trauma
healPhysicalTrauma: Heal 1 physical trauma | Heal {count} physical trauma
increaseFloodLevelOfYourLocation: Increase the flood level of your location
chooseInvestigatorForKey: Choose an investigator to take control of the {color} key
leaveVehicleNoReentry: Leave the vehicle. You cannot enter that vehicle for the remainder of the round
minusToYourNextSkillTestThisRound: You get -{count} to your next skill test this round
name: {name}
placeAgendaDoom: Place 1 doom on the current agenda. | Place {count} doom on the current agenda.
placeAgendaDoomCanAdvance: Place 1 doom on the current agenda. This effect can cause the current agenda to advance. | Place {count} doom on the current agenda. This effect can cause the current agenda to advance.
placeCluesOnNearestEnemy: Place 1 of your clues on nearest enemy | Place {count} of your clues on nearest enemy
placeCluesOnYourLocation: Place 1 of your clues on your location | Place {count} of your clues on your location
placeDamageOn: Place 1 damage on {name} | Place {count} damage on {name}
placeDoomOn: Place 1 doom on {name} | Place {count} doom on {name}
placeOnBottomOfEncounterDeck: Place on bottom of encounter deck
placeOnTopOfEncounterDeck: Place on top of encounter deck
raiseAlarmLevel: Raise your alarm level by 1 | Raise your alarm level by {count}
resolveAdditionalTarget: Resolve 1 additional target of the search
removeAgendaDoom: Remove 1 doom from the current agenda | Remove {count} doom from the current agenda
removeDoomFromPlayerCard: Remove 1 doom from a player card at your location
removeTokenForRemainderOfCampaign: Choose token to remove from the chaos bag for the remainder of the campaign
passByLess: Pass by 1 less | Pass by {count} less
passByMore: Pass by 1 more | Pass by {count} more
putBackOnTopInAnyOrder: Put Back on Top in any order
searchAdditionalCards: Search 1 additional card | Search {count} additional cards
sufferPhysicalTrauma: Suffer physical trauma | Suffer {count} physical trauma
sufferMentalTrauma: Suffer mental trauma | Suffer {count} mental trauma
takeAdditionalActionThisTurn: Take an additional action this turn
yourDeckIsEmptyTakeHorror: Your deck is empty, take 1 horror
takeDirectDamageAndHorror: Take {damage} direct damage and {horror} direct horror
takeHorrorForEachPointOfFailure: Take 1 horror for each point you failed by | Take {count} horror for each point you failed by

cost.scenarioResource: {count} Resource from the scenario reference | {count} Resources from the scenario reference

cosmicEvils.option: Take 1 direct damage and 1 direct horror, gain surge

mutated.option: Each investigator at your location takes 1 horror
